response: The king whose reign is the first included in the Year Books was known by several other names. Specifically, he was referred to as "Gothabhaya" of Anuradhapura, also known as "Meghavannabhaya," "Gothakabhaya," or "Goluaba." He was the last of three friends who seized the throne from King Vijaya Kumara and ruled the country during the early centuries of the Anuradhapura Kingdom.
